chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI SCRA 91 of 2022 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection No.10 & 26 2. For orders on CMA No.622/2022 3. For hearing of main case 29.01.2026 Mr. Salman Aziz, advocate for the applicant On 11.09.2025, following order was passed: “When confronted, counsel requests for time to rephrase the questions of law. At his request time allowed. Adjourned” Today no rephrased questions of law are placed on record and no justification has been articulated. In view hereof this reference application is dismissed for non-prosecution. A copy of this order may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Judge Judge Amjad
